default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on the Evolution Summit launch plan and a new client's automation setup.](https://fathom.video/share/5VWfEzT7mdE_iZfy1YAfbhe29aaFPgZQ?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Summit Launch Plan Ready:** A 120-page copy doc details the entire Summit campaign (capture, warm-up, sales) across all channels. Execution begins Monday, April 6.](https://fathom.video/share/5VWfEzT7mdE_iZfy1YAfbhe29aaFPgZQ?tab=summary&timestamp=9.0)
  - [**Immediate Summit Priority:** The capture page must be live by Monday. Diego will build the page in Rappet, and Davidson will handle the technical backend (form integration, WhatsApp group setup).](https://fathom.video/share/5VWfEzT7mdE_iZfy1YAfbhe29aaFPgZQ?tab=summary&timestamp=349.0)
  - [**New Client Automation:** Diego will design two automation flows (official buyer, abandoned cart) for a new client. Davidson will provide the platform and technical support for the setup.](https://fathom.video/share/5VWfEzT7mdE_iZfy1YAfbhe29aaFPgZQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1031.0)
  - [**Production Bottleneck:** The Summit's high-volume content requires immediate support from the agency or a designer (Orion) to create visuals.](https://fathom.video/share/5VWfEzT7mdE_iZfy1YAfbhe29aaFPgZQ?tab=summary&timestamp=485.0)

## Topics

### Evolution Summit Launch Plan

  - [**Plan Overview:** Diego created a 120-page copy doc detailing the full launch campaign, structured into four phases:](https://fathom.video/share/5VWfEzT7mdE_iZfy1YAfbhe29aaFPgZQ?tab=summary&timestamp=9.0)
      - [**Capture (starts April 6):** Drive registrations for the free Summit.](https://fathom.video/share/5VWfEzT7mdE_iZfy1YAfbhe29aaFPgZQ?tab=summary&timestamp=78.0)
      - [**Warm-up (starts April 7):** Engage registered attendees.](https://fathom.video/share/5VWfEzT7mdE_iZfy1YAfbhe29aaFPgZQ?tab=summary&timestamp=161.0)
      - [**Launch (April 14–16):** Promote the live event.](https://fathom.video/share/5VWfEzT7mdE_iZfy1YAfbhe29aaFPgZQ?tab=summary&timestamp=206.0)
      - [**Sales (starts April 17):** Pitch the Academy to attendees.](https://fathom.video/share/5VWfEzT7mdE_iZfy1YAfbhe29aaFPgZQ?tab=summary&timestamp=257.0)
  - [**Content Strategy:**](https://fathom.video/share/5VWfEzT7mdE_iZfy1YAfbhe29aaFPgZQ?tab=summary&timestamp=647.0)
      - [**Davidson's Role:** Record short, simple videos (e.g., 15-sec Stories) and share authentic, behind-the-scenes content to humanize the campaign.](https://fathom.video/share/5VWfEzT7mdE_iZfy1YAfbhe29aaFPgZQ?tab=summary&timestamp=686.0)
      - [**Production:** Simple edits are sufficient, but more polished Reels are welcome if resources (Orion, agency) are available.](https://fathom.video/share/5VWfEzT7mdE_iZfy1YAfbhe29aaFPgZQ?tab=summary&timestamp=686.0)
  - [**Execution & Coordination:**](https://fathom.video/share/5VWfEzT7mdE_iZfy1YAfbhe29aaFPgZQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1230.0)
      - [**Task Management:** Diego will create a Notion calendar from the copy doc to track all posts and assign responsibilities.](https://fathom.video/share/5VWfEzT7mdE_iZfy1YAfbhe29aaFPgZQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1230.0)
      - [**Team Support:** The plan requires a "force-task" (force-task) from the agency and Orion to produce the high volume of required visuals.](https://fathom.video/share/5VWfEzT7mdE_iZfy1YAfbhe29aaFPgZQ?tab=summary&timestamp=485.0)

### New Client Automation Setup

  - [**Project Context:** A new client needs automation flows to nurture leads and recover abandoned carts.](https://fathom.video/share/5VWfEzT7mdE_iZfy1YAfbhe29aaFPgZQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1031.0)
  - [**Platform Status:** The platform is nearly ready; Davidson's team is finalizing the onboarding screen.](https://fathom.video/share/5VWfEzT7mdE_iZfy1YAfbhe29aaFPgZQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1074.0)
  - [**Diego's Role:** Design two initial automation flows:](https://fathom.video/share/5VWfEzT7mdE_iZfy1YAfbhe29aaFPgZQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1031.0)
    1.  [**Official Buyer Flow:** Nurture customers after their first purchase.](https://fathom.video/share/5VWfEzT7mdE_iZfy1YAfbhe29aaFPgZQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1031.0)
    2.  [**Abandoned Cart Flow:** Recover leads who don't complete a purchase.](https://fathom.video/share/5VWfEzT7mdE_iZfy1YAfbhe29aaFPgZQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1031.0)
  - [**Technical Requirements:**](https://fathom.video/share/5VWfEzT7mdE_iZfy1YAfbhe29aaFPgZQ?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
      - [**Lead Source:** The client's leads come from "Green," requiring an integration.](https://fathom.video/share/5VWfEzT7mdE_iZfy1YAfbhe29aaFPgZQ?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
      - [**Communication:** An official WhatsApp Business number is needed for automated messages.](https://fathom.video/share/5VWfEzT7mdE_iZfy1YAfbhe29aaFPgZQ?tab=summary&timestamp=980.0)
  - [**Onboarding Plan:**](https://fathom.video/share/5VWfEzT7mdE_iZfy1YAfbhe29aaFPgZQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1087.0)
    1.  [**Internal Sync:** Davidson will first demo the platform for Diego.](https://fathom.video/share/5VWfEzT7mdE_iZfy1YAfbhe29aaFPgZQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1087.0)
    2.  [**Client Review:** Diego will then present the proposed automation flows to the client.](https://fathom.video/share/5VWfEzT7mdE_iZfy1YAfbhe29aaFPgZQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1087.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Diego:**](https://fathom.video/share/5VWfEzT7mdE_iZfy1YAfbhe29aaFPgZQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1374.0)
      - [Build the Summit capture page in Rappet by tomorrow morning.](https://fathom.video/share/5VWfEzT7mdE_iZfy1YAfbhe29aaFPgZQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1374.0)
      - [Design the two automation flows for the new client.](https://fathom.video/share/5VWfEzT7mdE_iZfy1YAfbhe29aaFPgZQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1031.0)
      - [Create the Summit publication calendar in Notion.](https://fathom.video/share/5VWfEzT7mdE_iZfy1YAfbhe29aaFPgZQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1230.0)
  - [**Davidson:**](https://fathom.video/share/5VWfEzT7mdE_iZfy1YAfbhe29aaFPgZQ?tab=summary&timestamp=349.0)
      - [Configure the Summit capture page backend (form integration, WhatsApp group).](https://fathom.video/share/5VWfEzT7mdE_iZfy1YAfbhe29aaFPgZQ?tab=summary&timestamp=349.0)
      - [Secure production support (Orion, agency) for Summit visuals.](https://fathom.video/share/5VWfEzT7mdE_iZfy1YAfbhe29aaFPgZQ?tab=summary&timestamp=485.0)
      - [Demo the automation platform for Diego tomorrow.](https://fathom.video/share/5VWfEzT7mdE_iZfy1YAfbhe29aaFPgZQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1087.0)

action_items.description: Add 2 days to capture plan; update doc
Record 15s opening video for Apr 6 launch
Create WhatsApp avisos group; add link to Rappet thank-you
Post both doc links in group description for Diego
Build Notion content calendar from copy doc
Build Rappet capture page; coordinate form/CRM w/ Davidson; deliver 1st version by Apr 2 AM
